latestEntry.notes: Week 5 Day 6 of Talk 4. Case Study focus: Lollapalooza Effects through 5 case snapshots - New Coke (psychology blind spot), social media algorithms (lollapalooza engine), career pivot mistakes (single-model thinking), Berkshire's tech bubble avoidance (inversion win), Theranos (inversion checklist ignored). Mental Model Drill on Lollapalooza Effects, 3 reflection questions on single-model decisions, workplace man-with-a-hammer syndrome, and building multidisciplinary latticework.
